info.title: Cnct
info.description: Cnct is a cross-platform command-line tool that aims to make bootstrapping your developer environment easier. This is accomplished by providing a set of common operations (e.g. creating symlinks) that can be expressed in a simple configuration.

options.name: config
options.description: Path to a configuration file. If not supplied, a file called 'cnct.json' in the current directory will be used, if it can be found.

options.name: quiet
options.description: Suppress all output other than errors.
